page: Microsoft Azure F2-1ams_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Famsv7 server family. It features 1 dedicated vCPU and 16.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per core. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and utilizes AMD processors.

This server type does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is premium storage capable, allowing connection to external high-performance persistent disks. It includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high resource density of 16 GB RAM for a single dedicated vCPU, the F2-1ams_v7 offers a cost-efficient profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high parallel compute power. It is suitable for small-scale databases, caching layers, lightweight enterprise applications, and memory-bound background tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure F2-1ams_v7 is an x86_64 memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 1 dedicated vCPU powered by an AMD processor and 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high 16:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs but is premium storage capable, allowing users to attach external high-performance storage volumes. With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server is designed for secure, memory-bound workloads. It provides a cost-efficient option for resource-dense environments where memory capacity is prioritized over high CPU core counts. The F2-1ams_v7 is well-suited for small databases, in-memory caching, and lightweight enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F2-1ams_v7 is a memory-intensive x86_64 virtual machine featuring 1 dedicated AMD vCPU, 16.0 GB of RAM, and premium storage capabilities, optimized for memory-bound workloads.

tagline: A memory-intensive, single-vCPU virtual machine designed for resource-dense, memory-bound workloads requiring premium external storage capabilities.
bullet_points: 1 dedicated AMD vCPU on x86_64 architecture
16.0 GB of system memory with a 16:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio
Premium storage capable with no local storage bundled
Best suited for small databases and in-memory caching
